title: La mujer que yo perdí
writer: Carlos González Dueñas, Manuel R. Ojeda
actors: Pedro Infante, Blanca Estela Pavón, Manuel R. Ojeda
plot: This is the story of a revolutionary man who fights against injustice and poverty and of the woman who loves him unconditionally in spite of his indifference. She will eventually die for him as he finally discovers the love she ha...
